home.title: Activate Your USALOCALSIM Service
home.subtitle: Our technical team manually processes every request for guaranteed quality.

activate.title: Activate Your USALOCALSIM Service
activate.subtitle: Our technical team manually processes every request for guaranteed quality. Follow the steps below.
activate.option1Title: Option 1: I have a USALOCALSIM Card and a Voucher
activate.option1Desc: Enter your ICCID and Voucher code. Your activation will be processed manually in minutes at no extra cost.
activate.option2Title: Option 2: I only have a USALOCALSIM Card
activate.option2Desc: Enter your ICCID to choose your data plan and pay via Credit Card or Crypto. Your initial SIM cost will be discounted.
activate.option3Title: Option 3: I have an eSIM Voucher
activate.option3Desc: Enter your voucher code to receive your digital QR code via email once processed by our team.
activate.optionHint: Option 1: Enter ICCID + Voucher (Combo). Option 2: ICCID only (choose plan and pay). Option 3: eSIM voucher only.
activate.comboEmailHint: Enter your email. Your activation will be processed manually in minutes at no extra cost.
activate.esimEmailHint: Enter your email to receive your digital QR code once processed by our team.

success.title: Request Received!
success.message: Our technical team is now manually activating your USALOCALSIM service. You will receive a confirmation message/email in a few minutes once your line is live.

plan.title: Choose your data plan
plan.subtitle: Enter your ICCID to choose your data plan and pay via Credit Card or Crypto. Your initial SIM cost will be discounted.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.subtitle: Pay with Credit Card or Crypto
